description_long: This doll features a segmented, robotic design with a predominantly white and red color scheme. It has a round face with green eyes, red cheeks, and a wide, painted smile, as well as blue eyelashes and red pigtails styled in large curls. The doll wears a red, flared dress with puffed sleeves and a white underskirt, and its limbs are jointed with visible mechanical segments and blue fasteners. In one hand, it holds a silver microphone with a red base, while the other hand is open and extended forward. The feet are large and red with white toes and gold buttons, matching the overall playful yet mechanical aesthetic. The back of the doll reveals more of the segmented plating and the continuation of the pigtails.
description: A segmented, robotic doll with red pigtails, a red dress, and a silver microphone, featuring a white and red color scheme and mechanical joints.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, red pigtails, red dress, microphone in right hand, and open left hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the pigtail, and the microphone held forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented back, both pigtails, and the back of the dress and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the open left hand, and the mechanical joints in the arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a bright red, flared dress with puffed sleeves and a white underskirt, reminiscent of a circus or clown costume. The outfit is accented with red shoes featuring gold buttons and white toe caps, and the overall style is playful and theatrical.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, right arm bent and holding a microphone, and left arm extended outward with an open hand. Both legs are straight and slightly apart, giving a stable, balanced stance.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, painted smile with upturned lips, green eyes open wide, and arched blue eyebrows, giving a cheerful and animated expression.
attribute_hair_style: Bright red hair styled in two large, curled pigtails, each secured with a band, and parted in the middle.
